modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about the purpose of Slide Master in PowerPoint

full_description_text: The user was trying to understand what Slide Master is in PowerPoint. They were unclear on its functionality and how it can be utilized effectively. This lack of clarity is impacting their ability to create consistent slide designs.
short_description: Confusion about the purpose of Slide Master in PowerPoint
description: The user was trying to understand what Slide Master is in PowerPoint. They were unclear on its functionality and how it can be utilized effectively. This lack of clarity is impacting their ability to create consistent slide designs.
